entries.title: Research artifact contract foundation
entries.goal: Create a deterministic, commandless artifact family for external-research outputs so project profiles, pattern sets, integration maps, and roadmap diffs can be reviewed and reused across repos.
entries.rationale: Wave One research should become reusable contract truth before any research command or runtime surface exists.

entries.title: Repo scorecard engine and report contract
entries.goal: Turn Wave One repo standards into deterministic scorecard checks and stable report artifacts without introducing a portal clone or new command surface first.
entries.rationale: Scorecards should build on stable research artifact shapes instead of bespoke planning prose.

entries.title: Golden-path template registry
entries.goal: Publish checked-in template descriptors for common repo and feature archetypes so downstream adoption can reuse governed defaults instead of copy-pasted setup guidance.
entries.rationale: Template descriptors should consume stable project-profile and integration-map research outputs.
